visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with two women standing on a residential street in front of a building with blue metal shutters. The woman on the left wears a beige pleated top and white skirt, while the woman on the right wears a black overall dress and a zebra-pattern bucket hat. They are talking and gesturing excitedly toward the camera. (2) The scene transitions to the interior of a professional dessert studio or kitchen. The environment is brightly lit with clinical studio lighting, featuring stainless steel workstations, professional ovens, and mixing equipment. A white paper bag with a cartoon cow logo is handed over by a staff member. (3) A box containing five different colored Swiss rolls is presented on a grey marble tabletop. The rolls are individually wrapped in plastic, showcasing green matcha, dark chocolate, and light brown tea flavors. The camera uses close-up shots to highlight the creamy texture of the fillings and the sponginess of the cakes. (4) The woman in the bucket hat is seen sitting at a dining table in a warmly lit indoor living room. She uses a silver fork to cut into and taste each of the rolls. Her facial expressions are highly animated, showing wide eyes and smiling to indicate pleasure. The background includes home furniture like a sofa and pillows. (5) The final sequence features the women summarizing their experience. They are seen behind a colorful cutout counter with milk bottle graphics and various decorative stickers. The camera remains mostly handheld, providing a dynamic and personal perspective throughout the tasting and review.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 超隱藏生乳捲. [Slogan]: 私藏口袋名單. [Slogan]: 從私宅賣到開店. [Subtitle]: 妹妹 我們要去哪裡啊. (2) [Slogan]: 隱藏在私宅小巷內. [Subtitle]: 我們要去一家宜蘭. (3) [Slogan]: 沒有店面 也沒有招牌的. [Slogan]: 人氣甜點店. [Subtitle]: 隱藏在私宅小巷內 沒有店面 也沒有招牌的 人氣甜點店. (4) [Subtitle]: 老闆娘厲害 我們在門口就開門了. (5) [Variety]: 哇. [Subtitle]: 好香哦. (6) [Logo]: ALL-IN ROLL. [Subtitle]: 謝謝. [Subtitle]: 小牛牛 哇. (7) [Subtitle]: 就直接在這邊製作嗎. [Subtitle]: 對啊 好香哦. (8) [Variety]: HERE 現在假日有店面營業囉!. [Subtitle]: 老闆問我們打開 還是...很好吃 我覺得桃園加盟一家. (9) [Variety]: 老闆說六日現場也可以買~嘿嘿嘿. [Subtitle]: 老闆說六日現場也可以買~嘿嘿嘿. (10) [Slogan]: 自選五種口味 340元 一片是68元. [Subtitle]: 自選五種口味 340元 一片是68元. (11) [Subtitle]: 我選的是焙茶蘋果. (12) [Variety]: 👀. [Variety]: 吃起來意外的清爽. [Subtitle]: 焙茶味蓬鬆的糕體 搭配蜜脆的蘋果 吃起來意外的清爽. (13) [Subtitle]: 十勝紅茶. (14) [Variety]: ✅ 茶味超濃. [Subtitle]: 這個茶香很厲害 茶味超濃 奶油不膩 我覺得這個很厲害. (15) [Slogan]: 5倍濃厚抹茶. [Subtitle]: 接下來是5倍濃厚抹茶 希望會超濃. (16) [Variety]: 🍵 真的好濃. [Subtitle]: 非常合格 真的很濃. (17) [Variety]: 📢 就是這個濃!. [Subtitle]: 星巴克濃厚抹茶冰加到10匙的粉量 就是這個濃. (18) [Subtitle]: 榛果黑森林裡面有莓果. (19) [Variety]: 💥 一樣厲害. [Subtitle]: 他們家的茶真的太厲害了 可是這黑森林也一樣厲害. (20) [Subtitle]: 那個櫻桃 非常的酸甜飽滿 最重要是 她有一層薄薄的脆脆像Nutella那個 是我吃過最好吃的黑森林蛋糕. (21) [Variety]: 🍵 抹茶為冠軍. [Subtitle]: 總結如果你要賺大錢 你就買抹茶 因為抹茶粉很貴 他的抹茶給的真的超足夠.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 female staff member in the kitchen.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair, wearing a beige blouse and white skirt. The other has short hair, wearing a zebra-pattern bucket hat, a green cardigan over a black top, and a black overall dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An outdoor residential alleyway with metal shutters; a professional stainless steel dessert kitchen with ovens; a decorated retail counter with cartoon graphics; and a cozy indoor living room with a couch and plush toys.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-tempo, upbeat electronic pop music featuring a strong percussive beat. Two female voices speak with high energy and rapid speech rates. Their tone is enthusiastic and welcoming, with bright pitch characteristics and high variability in intonation. (2) A sharp 'pop' sound effect marks a transition to the next phase. The background music continues at a steady BPM. The primary speaker's voice remains clear and well-projected, describing the location details. The acoustics suggest a professional studio environment with minimal noise. (3) As the dessert box is revealed, a high-pitched 'ding' sound effect emphasizes the visual. The music continues, maintaining a cheerful vibe. The speaker uses expressive vocal inflections, highlighting specific product names with increased volume and pitch. (4) During the tasting sequence, the sound of the BGM is slightly lowered to allow for more detailed vocal descriptions. Each transition between flavored rolls is accompanied by a 'bubble' or 'hit' SFX. The narrator's voice reflects high valence and arousal, using sounds like 'mmm' to show satisfaction. (5) The video concludes with a energetic summary over the continuing upbeat BGM. Multiple sound effects are used in quick succession to match the rapid appearance of text on screen, ending on a final high-pitched vocal accent.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Introduction -> Production Showcase -> Detailed Tasting Review -> Conclusion/Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and promote a specialty dessert shop named ALL-IN ROLL, specifically focusing on their unique Swiss roll flavors like hojicha apple, black tea, and intense matcha. The video highlights the shop's hidden location and quality ingredients.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct demonstration of products, brand logo visibility, and positive recommendation of flavors and prices.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly engaging social-media style food vlog with dense text overlays and fast-paced editing, tailored for short-form video consumers.
